use_cases: Animated 3D text reveal for hero sections and landing pages
Brand name presentations with a 'sneaking' entrance effect
Creative typography showcase for portfolios and agencies
Dark/light theme-aware text animations for modern web apps
Cinematic intro sequences for digital products
ai_summary: A Three.js-powered 3D text animation component that renders animated text with a 'sneak' reveal effect. Features automatic dark/light theme detection for SVG text textures, orthographic camera setup for clean 2D-style 3D rendering, and WebGL antialiasing for smooth visuals. Designed for hero sections, brand reveals, and creative presentations where text needs to animate in with a distinctive sneaking/morphing effect.
